questionHtml: Outline the reason that sodium hydroxide is considered a Brønsted–Lowry base.

meta.title: Outline the reason that sodium hydroxide is considered a Brønsted–Lowry base.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?
Reactivity 3.1.1—Brønsted–Lowry acid is a proton donor and a Brønsted–Lowry base is a proton acceptor. Deduce the Br.nsted–Lowry acid and base in a reaction.
